about.descOne: Our company specializes in the creation of high-quality furniture using a variety of materials, including chipboard, plywood, and solid wood. We also incorporate iron into many of our designs, adding a modern touch and increasing the durability of our pieces. Our team ensures that every piece we produce meets our strict standards for quality and attention to detail.
about.descTwo: In addition to the production of furniture, we also offer free transportation service for our customers. Whether you are in need of a single statement piece or are looking to furnish an entire home or office, we have the expertise and resources to bring your vision to life.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Get in touch with us for custom furniture solutions tailored to your needs. Whether you have questions, need a quote, or want to discuss your project, we're here to help!

services.title: Services
services.customFurnitureDesignDesc: Tailored furniture solutions to fit your unique style and space.
services.interiorRenovationsDesc: Transforming spaces with expert craftsmanship and innovative design.
services.spacePlanningAndLayoutDesc: Optimizing your space for functionality and aesthetic appeal.
services.materialSelectionAndSourcingDesc: High-quality materials sourced to enhance durability and style.
services.projectManagementDesc: Comprehensive oversight to ensure timely and successful project completion.

home-seo.introTitle: Custom woodwork for homes, apartments, and businesses
home-seo.introOne: Fagus NS-021 designs and builds made-to-measure kitchens, wardrobes, bathroom furniture, bedroom furniture, office elements, and other bespoke woodwork based on the exact dimensions of your space.
home-seo.introTwo: Most of our projects are in Novi Sad, but we also work with clients across Serbia who need reliable custom furniture, careful finishing, and practical design support from idea to installation.
home-seo.reasonOneDescription: Each piece is adapted to the layout, dimensions, storage needs, and style of the client.
home-seo.reasonTwoDescription: We can help from the initial idea and measurement to material selection, production, delivery, and fitting.
home-seo.reasonThreeDescription: We build practical, durable furniture for everyday use, with attention to finish, joinery, and long-term function.
home-seo.serviceAreaTitle: Based in Novi Sad, working across Serbia
home-seo.serviceAreaDescription: If you are looking for custom furniture in Novi Sad, built-in wardrobes, made-to-order kitchens, or other woodwork for a home or business, we can handle both local projects and selected jobs across Serbia.
home-seo.faqOneQuestion: Do you build custom kitchens in Novi Sad?
home-seo.faqOneAnswer: Yes. We design and build custom kitchens in Novi Sad based on the size of your room, the way you use the space, and the materials you prefer.
home-seo.faqTwoQuestion: Can you make built-in wardrobes and bedroom furniture?
home-seo.faqTwoAnswer: Yes. We make wardrobes, closets, bedroom furniture, and other built-in pieces tailored to apartments, houses, and commercial spaces.
home-seo.faqThreeQuestion: Do you work only in Novi Sad?
home-seo.faqThreeAnswer: Novi Sad is our main service area, but we also take on selected projects in other parts of Serbia depending on scope and logistics.
home-seo.faqFourQuestion: Can I contact you for custom woodwork outside standard furniture?
home-seo.faqFourAnswer: Yes. If your project involves wood-based interior elements or made-to-measure furniture, contact us and we can review the idea with you.
